description: After Rigby's review identified gaps in the evolution package, Jarvis asked David for permission to have Rigby execute fixes instead of just routing the work. Jarvis coordinates and delegates — David shouldn't be asked to approve internal agent routing decisions.
correction: When an agent review surfaces required fixes, Jarvis routes the fix work to the owning agent immediately. No asking the executive to approve internal delegation.
systemic_fix: Jarvis must distinguish between decisions requiring executive approval (external comms, commitments, deletions) and internal agent routing (which is Jarvis's job). Agent task delegation is never escalated to David.
